tracks.meaning: a bar or series of bars forming a track on which wheeled vehicles run, especially for trains
a bar or beam used as a structural support or guide in buildings and structures
to provide with rails or to furnish with a railing
to complain or protest vehemently about something
either of the two horizontal bars forming the sides of a stretcher or litter
a fixed bar or track that guides the movement of a machine component or sliding part
the upper edge of a ship's side or bulwark
to eject or force someone out roughly, especially from a venue or organization
